CustomField.description: Initial estimate of the investment required to re-configure this aircraft to client's needs. This is typically a rough estimate by the marketing rep and later refined by setting up details the Modification Costs section
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Initial estimate of the investment required (in $ millions) to re-configure this aircraft to client's needs. This is typically a rough estimate by the marketing rep and later refined by setting up details the Modification Costs section
CustomField.label: Transition & Mod Costs ($M)
